summary: Relaylane is safe to merge as a TrustLayer demo target because all risky scenarios remain seeded, deterministic, and non-executable. The premium proof layer improves audit storytelling without creating live exploit paths.
verified_now: npm run verify:demo passes artifact consistency checks
Agent traces and evidence bundle are internally consistent
Replay index maps cleanly to seven seeded findings
manual_review_needed: Config and frontend exposure narrative remains a reviewer-owned interpretation
Auth/session trust story is intentionally partial because no real auth system exists
highest_score_drivers: Safe-to-merge summary tied to verification results
